gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/370)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/370)
text: دَخَلَ قَوْمٌ فَوَعَظَهُمْ ثُمَّ قَالَ مَا مِنْكُمْ مِنْ أَحَدٍ إِلَّا وَ قَدْ عَايَنَ الْجَنَّةَ وَ مَا فِيهَا وَ عَايَنَ النَّارَ وَ مَا فِيهَا إِنْ كُنْتُمْ تُصَدِّقُونَ بِالْكِتَابِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Mahboub, from Ibrahim Bin Mihzam, from Al hakam Bin Salim who said,

‘A group came over, so he<sup>asws</sup> advised them, then said: ‘There is not one of you except that he has visualised the Paradise and whatever is in it, and visualised the Fire and whatever there is in it, if you are ratifying by the Book’.
en.sarwar: 16. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn Mahbub from Ibrahim ibn Mehzam from Hakam ibn Salim who has said the following: “Once a people came to the Imam (abu Ja’far or abu ‘Abd Allah, recipient of divine supreme covenant) who granted them good advice and then said, ‘If you really affirm the Holy book there is no one among you who have not observed paradise and all that it contains or the fire with all that is in it.’”
